assetDebugEntries.resolvedAltText: Humpback whale ( Megaptera novaeangliae ) lobtailing filmed in slow motion at Ísafjarðardjúp (Iceland). It is believed that lobtailing is practiced by humpback whales either to communicate or as a mean of foraging.
